'''âb-k-p-sh''' ('''kabakpeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exeunt|exeunt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-p-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exeunt|exeunt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-k-p-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kabakpeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibakpeshoko|thibakpeshoko]] || [[word:jibakpeshoko|jibakpeshoko]] || [[word:shibakpeshoko|shibakpeshoko]] || [[word:kibakpeshoko|kibakpeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubakpeshoko|thuthubakpeshoko]] || [[word:jujubakpeshoko|jujubakpeshoko]] || [[word:shushubakpeshoko|shushubakpeshoko]] || [[word:kukubakpeshoko|kukubakpeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubakpeshoko|thubakpeshoko]] || [[word:jubakpeshoko|jubakpeshoko]] || [[word:shubakpeshoko|shubakpeshoko]] || [[word:kubakpeshoko|kubakpeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubakpeshoko|thubakpeshoko]] || [[word:jubakpeshoko|jubakpeshoko]] || [[word:shubakpeshoko|shubakpeshoko]] || [[word:kubakpeshoko|kubakpeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebakpeshoko|thebakpeshoko]] || [[word:jebakpeshoko|jebakpeshoko]] || [[word:shebakpeshoko|shebakpeshoko]] || [[word:kebakpeshoko|kebakpeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobakpeshoko|thothobakpeshoko]] || [[word:jojobakpeshoko|jojobakpeshoko]] || [[word:shoshobakpeshoko|shoshobakpeshoko]] || [[word:kokobakpeshoko|kokobakpeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobakpeshoko|thobakpeshoko]] || [[word:jobakpeshoko|jobakpeshoko]] || [[word:shobakpeshoko|shobakpeshoko]] || [[word:kobakpeshoko|kobakpeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobakpeshoko|thobakpeshoko]] || [[word:jobakpeshoko|jobakpeshoko]] || [[word:shobakpeshoko|shobakpeshoko]] || [[word:kobakpeshoko|kobakpeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbakpeshoko|thĂŠbakpeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbakpeshoko|jĂŠbakpeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbakpeshoko|shĂŠbakpeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbakpeshoko|kĂŠbakpeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabakpeshoko|thathabakpeshoko]] || [[word:jajabakpeshoko|jajabakpeshoko]] || [[word:shashabakpeshoko|shashabakpeshoko]] || [[word:kakabakpeshoko|kakabakpeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabakpeshoko|thabakpeshoko]] || [[word:jabakpeshoko|jabakpeshoko]] || [[word:shabakpeshoko|shabakpeshoko]] || [[word:kabakpeshoko|kabakpeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabakpeshoko|thabakpeshoko]] || [[word:jabakpeshoko|jabakpeshoko]] || [[word:shabakpeshoko|shabakpeshoko]] || [[word:kabakpeshoko|kabakpeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabakpeshithi|shabakpeshithi]] || [[word:shabakpeshiji|shabakpeshiji]] || [[word:shabakpeshishi|shabakpeshishi]] || [[word:shabakpeshiki|shabakpeshiki]]
